description: HTTP, user events by realm/client, Infinispan cache health, DB connection pool, worker pool, JVM, and live logs.

panels.description: Live Keycloak logs. Filter by level, realm, or clientId using Loki label filters.
panels.title: Keycloak Logs

panels.description: Login attempts with an error label set
panels.title: Failed Logins (total)

panels.description: Successful auth flow events per realm
panels.title: Login & Token Rate by Realm

panels.description: Spikes in failed logins or lockouts may indicate a brute force attempt
panels.title: Failed & Security Events Rate

panels.description: Rate of every tracked event type — useful for spotting unusual activity
panels.title: All Events by Type

panels.description: Per-cache hit ratio. Low values on sessions/users/realms = cold cache or thrashing
panels.title: Cache Hit Rate by Cache

panels.description: Threads blocked waiting for a DB connection. Any sustained value > 0 is a problem.
panels.title: Awaiting Connections

panels.description: Queue > 0 sustained means workers are saturated
panels.title: Worker Pool Active & Queue

title: Keycloak — Health & Auth
